description: The Color By Speed Texture component samples from the x axis of the UV depending on the min and max speeds being a 0-1 range and values beyond the range being extrapolated.

fields.MinSpeed: The speed the particle has to be be traveling at or under to be considered minimum speed.
fields.MaxSpeed: The speed the particle has to be be traveling at or above to be considered maximum speed.
fields.U_WrapMode: How to wrap around the X axis.
fields.Texture: The texture to sample color from.
